TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Parius, title = Parius, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parius} }

S.FORM: alang Parius ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Mansyu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 88 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 236 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Parius hya' ga Tjadukudukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Parius ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Mansyu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 88 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 236 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Parius hya' ga Tjadukudukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ parius~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu mans~ɕju ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na parius~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tja*uku*ukuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
